title: Running of time limitations; exception; third degree rape
doc_html:
Art. 573.4. Running of time limitations; exception; third degree rape

            The time limitations established by Article 572 shall not commence to run as to the crime of third degree rape (R.S. 14:43) until the crime is discovered by the victim.

            Acts 2024, No. 557, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 573.4.  Running of time limitations; exception; third degree rape
The time limitations established by Article 572 shall not commence to run as to the
crime of third degree rape (R.S. 14:43) until the crime is discovered by the victim.
Acts 2024, No. 557, §1.
